description.english: Complete all arena in every difficulty
Kill 500 Eggy, the walking egg in Egglosseum
Using Ersa, complete Frozen Pond with the Stardust skill card
Get cursed for the first time
Complete a run with 1/2 HP left
Create a chain explosion of 6 Pomegrenades, the explosive fruit in Carrot Farm
Kill 2 Elite Strawberry Charger, the charging strawberry in Carrot Farm
Deal 200,000 damage using Beast element skill cards
Defeat the Dragon Fruit using Shroomba
Kill 500 enemies using the Frozen Splash skill card
Have a total of 6 Nature cards in your library
Have a total of 8 Night cards in your library
Deal a total of 300,000 damage using any weapon
Defeat a boss without taking HP damage in the boss room
Kill 100 Beetle, a flying insect in Lava Jungle
Using Shroomba, Groovba, or Joomba reach Level 30
Using Ersa, Fuzzbug, or X-olotl reach Level 30
Using Nutcase, NutzNBoltZ, or Chimpy reach Level 30
Upgrade Water Flow passive card to Level 7
Mutate Thunderspear with Thunder Swipe mutation
Kill 500 enemies using the Thunderspear skill card
Defeat 1,000 Ghostpepper, the jumping chili in Carrot Farm
Kill 5,000 enemies while having the Night Owl passive card
Kill 5,000 enemies using the Shockwave skill card
Kill 6,000 enemies using Boulder Bonk skill card
Defeat 5,000 Ghostpepper, the jumping chili in Carrot Farm
Mutate Frozen Splash with Ice Said Stop mutation 3 times
Reach +120% movement speed increase during a run
Get kidnapped to the boss room 10 times
Spray the Fire King for the first time in the Sanctuary
Win any Hard arena using Growing Pains, a fire skill
Find the "Self Portrait" (0.01% chance to drop from enemies in Egglosseum)
Kill 250 Guppy, the walking fish in Frozen Pond using Splash Shot skill card
Kill 1,000 enemies using the Boulder Bonk skill card
Upgrade Green Heart passive card to Level 2
Upgrade Lucky Dice passive card to Level 7
Survive 6 Minutes without taking any damage
Kill 300 Cave Fruit, the dancing coconut in Lava Jungle
Stand and don't move for 1 minute in any arena
Deal critical damage using your weapon 1,000 times
Douse a total of 30 Fire Curse
